resume_text:
Aisha Khan — Senior Product Manager

EXPERIENCE
Senior PM, Acme Corp — 2022-Present (Dubai)
- Owned the roadmap for the core trading platform serving 50K monthly users
- Shipped 14 major features in 18 months, including a real-time risk engine that reduced customer churn by 22%
- Managed a cross-functional team of 8 (engineering, design, data)
- Promoted from PM in 2024 after leading the launch of our enterprise tier ($2.4M ARR in year one)

Product Manager, Tech Co — 2019-2022 (Dubai)
- First PM hire; built the practice from zero
- Led customer discovery for a B2B integration product, interviewed 80+ companies
- Shipped MVP in 6 weeks; product later became 30% of company revenue

Product Analyst, Consulting Firm — 2017-2019 (Mumbai)
- Built data infrastructure for product analytics across 5 client portfolios
- Tools: SQL, Python, Looker, Mixpanel

EDUCATION
MBA, Hult Dubai — 2017
B.Sc Computer Science, Mumbai University — 2014

SKILLS
Product strategy, roadmapping, customer discovery, A/B testing, SQL, Python, Figma, Mixpanel, Amplitude, Jira, Notion. Managed teams up to 8.

NOTABLE
- Speaker at Dubai Product Tank 2024 ("What I learned shipping in regulated markets")
- Mentor for Founder Institute Dubai cohort 2023-present
work_auth: Authorized to work in UAE; open to visa sponsorship for US/EU roles
